Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Continued To May-13-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PMGI FINANCIAL, LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, Request For Judicial Notice.

Grant. No opposition filed.

Counsel for plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2020 Continued To Mar-11-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration
Off Calendar Dec-06-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PMGI FINANCIAL, LLC's Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted.

No opposition filed. Motion granted. The Requests for Admission will be deemed admitted unless complete responses are served at or before the time of the hearing.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
